title: SAMSUNG - Jr. Manager Retail Analytics (gn) ID2907
required_skills: Mehrjährige Berufserfahrung in Datenanalyse / Marktanalyse / Vertriebssteuerung
matched_skills: Abgeschlossenes Studium (Master of Management, Leuphana + prior degrees)
Berufserfahrung in Datenanalyse & Marktanalyse (ECE Group, Hapag-Lloyd, HSBC)
Analytische Fähigkeiten — KPI frameworks, budget dashboards, ROI analysis
MS Excel + Datenvisualisierung (Power BI PL-300, Looker Studio)
missing_skills: Business-fluent German language skills required — candidate holds B1 only (hard requirement gap)
Retail Analytics / Retail KPI domain experience (POS, dealer network)
core_responsibilities: Conduct complex data analyses and derive clear action recommendations
Monitor Retail KPIs and create quality management reporting
Monitor and evaluate service provider / vendor activities
Segment Retail & Consumer measures (POS & Digital channels)
Visualise data and create compelling presentation slides for management
recommended_emphasis: Power BI PL-300 certification and data visualization experience (directly maps to Datenmodellierung & -visualisierung)
KPI framework design and management reporting (Hapag-Lloyd, HSBC, VfB Stuttgart)
Market and competitive analysis work at ECE Group (retail/marketplace sector)
Vendor/service provider monitoring and coordination experience
Executive presentation and data storytelling skills
score_notes: Raw formula score ~77% before penalty. German B1 vs. verhandlungssicher (C1+) is a hard-requirement blocker; 25% penalty applied → final score 57. Retail domain knowledge is also absent.
